azure_ad_operation_response_user_operati: Azure AD operation response. User operations return id, displayName, userPrincipalName, mail, jobTitle, department. Group operations return id, displayName, description, mailEnabled, securityEnabled, groupTypes. Member operations return id, displayName, mail, odataType.
create_a_new_azure_ad_entra_id_user: Create a new Azure AD (Entra ID) user account and add it to the right groups. Use when onboarding an employee or contractor.
disable_an_azure_ad_account_and_strip_it: Disable an Azure AD account and strip its group memberships when someone leaves. Use for secure offboarding.
integrate_azure_active_directory_into_yo: Integrate Azure Active Directory into your workflows. List, create, update, and delete users and groups. Manage group memberships programmatically.
list_the_members_of_an_azure_ad_group: List the members of an Azure AD group for an access review. Use for periodic attestation of privileged or sensitive groups.
manage_users_and_groups_in_azure_ad_micr: Manage users and groups in Azure AD (Microsoft Entra ID)
user_id_or_user_principal_name_e_g: User ID or user principal name (e.g., user@example.com)
user_id_to_add_or_remove: User ID to add or remove
